notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Erick Fedde picks off Zach Neto at 1st on throw to first baseman Miguel Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Vaughn Grissom.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth strikes out swinging. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Sam Antonacci steals (1) 2nd base. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Sebastián Rivero.

notableEvents.label: Munetaka Murakami pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Munetaka Murakami singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Josh Lowe. Derek Hill to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Vaughn Grissom.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Vaughn Grissom.
